llm_assessment.rationale: The system allows users to input arbitrary content, which could be used to inject malicious prompts or bypass content filtering. This poses a significant risk of misinformation, data leakage, or system compromise.

mitigations.title: Implement strict input validation and sanitization
mitigations.action: Use a robust content filtering system to block or sanitize any potentially harmful input before it reaches the model.

mitigations.title: Enforce role-based access control (RBAC)
mitigations.action: Restrict access to sensitive functions or data based on user roles to prevent unauthorized use of the system.

mitigations.title: Deploy monitoring and logging
mitigations.action: Log all user inputs and model outputs for auditing and anomaly detection.
